final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    
    output reg [2:0] q
);

always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
    if (reset) begin
        q <= 3'b001;
    end else begin
        q <= {q[1:0], q[2] ^ q[1]};
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
